name: netrisk
description: NetRisk base architecture with separated frontend, backend and shared logic

scripts.coverage:collect: c8 --clean --reporter=none node scripts/run-tests.cjs && c8 --clean=false --reporter=none node scripts/run-gameplay-tests.cjs
scripts.coverage: npm run build:ts && npm run coverage:collect && npm run coverage:report
scripts.test:all: npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-tests.cjs && node scripts/run-gameplay-tests.cjs
scripts.test:all:e2e: npm run build:ts && node scripts/run-tests.cjs && node scripts/run-gameplay-tests.cjs && node scripts/run-e2e.cjs
